reason: Most hemodialysis technicians work 12-hour shifts with extremely early start times (3:00 AM to 4:00 AM), which typically allows them to finish their workday by 4:00 PM. While outpatient roles generally involve no on-call duties, occasional late stays can occur due to mandatory overtime if patient treatments run late. However, transitioning to an acute hospital setting can introduce frequent, disruptive on-call expectations outside of standard hours.
